intro_cards.title: Direction Particle: へ
intro_cards.body:
へ (pronounced 'e' as a particle) indicates direction of movement.

• 東京へ行きます。(I'm going to Tokyo.)
• 家へ帰ります。(I'm going home.)

へ vs に for destinations:
• Both can express destination and are often interchangeable
• に emphasizes arrival at a specific point
• へ emphasizes the direction of travel

• 東京に行く = going TO Tokyo (arrival point)
• 東京へ行く = going TOWARD Tokyo (direction)

In practice, they're mostly interchangeable for travel.
